ValidationRule.description: Please enter the record to which this Commitment is Related To (for example Asset ,Lease,Lessee).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISBLANK( leaseworks__Associated_Asset__c ) , ISBLANK( leaseworks__Lease_L__c ),ISBLANK( leaseworks__Lessee_L_New__c ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter the record to which this Commitment is Related To (Asset or Lease or Lessee).
